title: Small Viking Villager House
description: Adds a small viking villager house to the world
body:
**Small Viking Villager House**

**This mod adds a small Viking style villager house to the taiga biomes.**

- Villagers of various professions live and trade inside this new Viking home.

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4611c6ce7964fb248c7b6ab85f1406a115db6384.jpeg)


- The interior is fully decorated, and you may even find some loot inside.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f81c06cdbe0f629dc553eaac5d600167e123eab.jpeg)


The structure can spawn in both regular Taiga and Snowy Taiga biomes.
